mano_cua.result_summary: 单选项bug确认：只有1个选项(January)被选中时显示'All selected'而非'January'。多选项全选时'All selected'正确。组件未区分单选项的边界情况。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Single Option Select shows 'All selected' instead of 'January' when the only option is selected. Multiple Options Select correctly shows 'All selected' when all 5 options are selected.
